first_sentence: Approve containment for risky identities in 60 seconds after evidence crosses threshold.

scenes.title: Hook
scenes.text: Approve containment for risky identities in 60 seconds after evidence crosses threshold. A finance admin starts as active, the evidence clock starts, and the judge sees the consequence before the pitch explains the stack.

scenes.title: Evidence crosses threshold
scenes.text: The operator lowers the policy threshold and the replayed Splunk-compatible events push confidence over the line. The screen does not return advice. It changes the containment state.

scenes.title: Human approval
scenes.text: Approval stays human-gated. One click writes evidence, approval, action, verification, and dossier records to production Cloudflare D1, KV, and R2.

scenes.title: Proof dossier
scenes.text: The dossier shows the chain: signal, context, decision, action, and proof. The export is stored server-side, so a reviewer can inspect the same artifact from a phone.

scenes.title: Architecture boundary
scenes.text: This deployment uses seeded Splunk-compatible telemetry because live Splunk credentials are not configured. The OpenAI-compatible reasoning call and Cloudflare proof storage are live.
